name: golang-github-xdg-go-pbkdf2-dev
title: golang-github-xdg-go-pbkdf2-dev
description:
PBKDF2 key generation (library)
The pbkdf2 module provides password-based key derivation based on RFC 8018
(https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc8018).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-xdg-go-pbkdf2-dev because PBKDF2 key generation (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-xdg-go-pbkdf2-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-xdg-go-pbkdf2-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-xdg-go-pbkdf2-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
